creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 178423
Update to 1.23.1

Niclas, I've added archivers/libunrar5 in r430150. Please try the update I've attached that is designed to build with libunrar5. I've done build tests with all supported versions of FreeBSD (i386, anyways) and it seems fine.

I've also reset maintainer, so if you are interested in maintaining this, it's yours.
